locations.name: 柬埔寨
locations.summary: 柬埔寨王國（高棉語：ព្រះរាជាណាចក្រកម្ពុជា，羅馬化：Preăh Réachéanachâk Kâmpŭchéa），通稱柬埔寨（高棉語：កម្ពុជា，羅馬化：Kâmpŭchéa），是位於東南亞中南半島的君主立憲制國家，…

locations.name: 老挝
locations.summary: 老挝人民民主共和国（寮語：ສາທາລະນະລັດ ປະຊາທິປະໄຕ ປະຊາຊົນລາວ，简写：ສປປ ລາວ），通稱寮國（寮語：ລາວ），是位于東南亞中南半岛的社会主义国家，首都及最大城市为万象，通行寮语，面积23.68万平方公里，…

locations.name: 泰国

locations.name: 越南
locations.summary: 越南社会主义共和国（越南語：Cộng hòa Xã hội chủ nghĩa Việt Nam／共和社會主義越南，），通称越南（越南語：Việt Nam），是位于东南亚中南半岛东端的社会主义国家。北接中国，西邻柬埔寨与老挝，全国人口约逾…

relations.subject: Coral-billed ground cuckoo
relations.evidence: The coral-billed ground cuckoo (Carpococcyx renauldi), also known as Renauld's ground cuckoo, is a large, terrestrial species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae, found in Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, and Vietnam

relations.subject: Coral-billed ground cuckoo
relations.evidence: As of 2024, the species is listed as Endangered by the IUCN, with habitat degradation, habitat loss, and bycatch of industrial drift-fence cable snaring noted as major threats. The species has also been threatened by traditional hunting and capture for live trade. On one occasion, a nest was reported to have failed as a result of predation by a pig-tailed macaque.Pobprasert, K., & Pierce, A
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
